lab: wei he ai pan chu zhong sheng gu ji zheng bu tuo tao bu guo mei tou jie bu kai de jie ming zhong jie bu kai de jie shi ni
lab_without_tone: wei he ai pan chu zhong sheng gu ji zheng bu tuo tao bu guo mei tou jie bu kai de jie ming zhong jie bu kai de jie shi ni
raw_text:
为何爱判处众生孤寂
挣不脱 逃不过
眉头解不开的结
命中解不开的劫
是你
